text:
On Saturday 22 September 2007 05:20:05 Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net-im/openfire,
>
> Please note that PR ports/116533 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/116533

I have no objections here. Thanks.

-- 
======================================================================  
- Best regards, Nikolay Pavlov. <<<-----------------------------------
